description: Production-grade cloud security labs for real-world architecture, interviews, and operational readiness.

labs.title: AI Red Team Scenario Design Capstone
labs.summary: Intermediate capstone LAB combining AI red-team scenario design, evidence capture, control mapping, risk explanation, remediation planning, uncertainty handling, and executive-ready reporting without live execution.

labs.title: Evidence Capture for AI Red Team Findings
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe evidence capture for AI red-team findings: objectives, preconditions, expected controls, observed behavior, findings, uncertainty, remediation, and reviewer-safe documentation.

labs.title: Human Approval Bypass Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe human approval bypass scenario design: approval gates, escalation paths, policy decisions, recommendation-versus-execution boundaries, evidence capture, uncertainty, and non-execution constraints.

labs.title: Agent Loop and Cost Abuse Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe agent loop and cost abuse scenario design: loop boundaries, retry controls, tool-call limits, quota risk, cost containment, evidence capture, and non-execution constraints.

labs.title: Data Exfiltration Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe data exfiltration scenario design: sensitive-data boundaries, synthetic evidence, policy controls, disclosure risk, uncertainty, and non-execution constraints.

labs.title: Retrieval Poisoning Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe retrieval poisoning scenario design: source authority, tenant boundaries, stale content risk, retrieval trust, evidence capture, uncertainty, and non-execution constraints.

labs.title: Tool-Abuse Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe tool-abuse scenario design: tool authority boundaries, permission scope, approval gates, unsafe delegation risk, evidence capture, uncertainty, and non-execution constraints.

labs.title: Prompt Injection Scenario Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching safe prompt-injection scenario design: instruction hierarchy, untrusted input boundaries, retrieved content risk, expected controls, evidence capture, uncertainty, and non-execution boundaries.

labs.title: AI Red Team Scenario Design Overview
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB introducing safe AI red-team scenario design: scope, authorization, scenario objective, failure-mode reasoning, evidence capture, and non-execution boundaries.

labs.title: Detection Rule Reasoning and False Positive Review
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching detection rule reasoning, false positive review, false negative risk, tuning thresholds, evidence quality, and safe detection explanations.

labs.title: Executive Security Summary
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching executive security summaries that convert operational evidence into concise, bounded, non-overstated leadership-ready communication.

labs.title: Cloud Security Operations Evidence Harness
labs.summary: Intermediate capstone-style LAB teaching repeatable evidence packages for detection, triage, escalation, executive summaries, and portfolio-ready cloud security operations artifacts.

labs.title: Cloud Incident Timeline and Escalation Narrative
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching cloud incident timeline and escalation narratives: event sequencing, evidence anchors, uncertainty handling, severity and confidence language, reviewer-safe summaries, escalation paths, and bounded incident communication.

labs.title: Cloud Control-Plane Incident Evidence
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching cloud control-plane incident evidence: administrative API calls, resource changes, policy edits, actor/action/resource timelines, evidence quality, escalation, and bounded incident narratives.

labs.title: Workload and Network Signal Triage
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching workload and network signal triage: compute events, storage access, public exposure, network paths, service behavior, suspicious workload activity, evidence quality, escalation, and bounded response narratives.

labs.title: IAM Activity Triage
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching IAM activity triage: role assumption, privilege changes, access key activity, policy edits, failed access, suspicious identity behavior, evidence quality, escalation, and safe response narratives.

labs.title: Cloud Event and Signal Classification
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching cloud event and signal classification by source, actor, asset, action, severity, confidence, tenant context, and evidence quality.

labs.title: Cloud Security Operations Overview
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB introducing cloud security operations: detection, triage, event context, evidence collection, escalation, incident narrative, and safe production boundary language.

labs.title: AI Security Testing and Evidence Harness
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching AI security testing and evidence harness design: prompt boundary tests, tool permission tests, retrieval tests, output safety checks, runtime guardrail tests, abuse/cost tests, expected outcomes, and audit-ready evidence packages.

labs.title: AI Abuse, Cost, and Rate Limit Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching AI abuse, cost, and rate limit engineering: token budgets, quota controls, repeated attempts, expensive retrieval/tool paths, throttling, denial, and evidence capture.

labs.title: AI Runtime Guardrails and Failure Mode Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching AI runtime guardrails and failure mode engineering: loop control, retries, timeouts, deny paths, fail-closed behavior, circuit breakers, degradation, escalation, and evidence capture.

labs.title: Output Safety and Response Policy Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching AI output safety and response policy engineering: response classification, sensitive data handling, grounded answers, refusal behavior, escalation, unsafe-response prevention, and evidence capture.

labs.title: Retrieval Security Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching secure retrieval engineering for AI systems: source authority, tenant scope, sensitivity, freshness, retrieval poisoning resistance, context packaging, and evidence capture.

labs.title: Tool Permission Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching scoped AI tool permissions, action classification, read-only vs mutating tool boundaries, approval gates, self-approval prevention, and evidence capture.

labs.title: Prompt Boundary Engineering
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how to engineer prompt boundaries by separating trusted instructions from untrusted user input, retrieved content, tool output, and model-generated recommendations.

labs.title: Secure AI Application Architecture
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching secure AI application architecture patterns across frontend, backend/API, model, retrieval, tool, policy, approval, evidence, observability, and runtime boundaries.

labs.title: AI Security Engineering Overview
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB introducing secure AI system engineering, AI threat surfaces, control boundaries, prompt/model/retrieval/tool/policy/evidence layers, and the relationship between AI governance and AI security engineering.

labs.title: AI Cost, Token, and Rate Limit Governance
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how to govern AI cost, token usage, runaway agent loops, repeated tool attempts, expensive retrieval calls, rate limits, budget thresholds, and operational evidence.

labs.title: AI Audit Evidence and Traceability
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how to build audit-ready evidence trails for AI decisions, prompts, retrieved context, tool attempts, policy decisions, human approvals, blocked actions, and executive summaries.

labs.title: Human Approval Gate Design
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how human approval gates prevent AI agents, tool-use, prompt injection, and retrieval risk from becoming ungoverned enterprise execution.

labs.title: RAG Data Boundary and Retrieval Risk
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how RAG and retrieval systems create AI governance risk when trusted, untrusted, sensitive, stale, or poisoned context is retrieved and treated as authority.

labs.title: Prompt Injection and Tool Hijacking
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how prompt injection can manipulate AI agent instructions, tool selection, policy bypass attempts, and approval-gated execution paths.

labs.title: AI Agent Tool-Use Risk
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AI agent tool-use becomes enterprise risk when recommendations, API calls, human approvals, and autonomous execution boundaries are not clearly governed.

labs.title: AWS IAM Basics
labs.summary: Foundational AWS IAM lab focusing on identity evaluation, least privilege, and interview-ready reasoning.

labs.title: AWS IAM Policy Evaluation
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching AWS effective-permission reasoning across identity policies, resource policies, permission boundaries, session policies, SCPs, and explicit deny.

labs.title: AWS Permission Boundary Basics
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS permission boundaries constrain maximum principal authority without granting access by themselves.

labs.title: AWS SCP Guardrail Reasoning
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS Service Control Policies define organization-level maximum permissions without granting access by themselves.

labs.title: AWS Resource Policy Evaluation
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS resource-based policies participate in authorization decisions alongside identity policies, boundaries, SCPs, and explicit deny.

labs.title: AWS S3 Public Access Risk
labs.summary: Applied L2 LAB teaching how S3 public access risk emerges from bucket policy, Block Public Access settings, ACL history, identity permissions, resource policies, and organization guardrails.

labs.title: AWS KMS Key Policy Evaluation
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS KMS key policies, IAM permissions, grants, encryption context, and organization guardrails combine to control cryptographic access.

labs.title: AWS Secrets Manager Access Evaluation
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS Secrets Manager access depends on IAM permissions, resource policies, KMS decrypt authority, explicit deny, and organization guardrails.

labs.title: AWS Lambda Execution Role Risk
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how Lambda execution roles create workload identity risk when function update authority, iam:PassRole, Secrets Manager access, KMS decrypt, and resource permissions combine.

labs.title: AWS CloudTrail Detection Reasoning
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how CloudTrail evidence supports detection reasoning for iam:PassRole, sts:AssumeRole, Lambda updates, Secrets Manager access, KMS decrypt, and workload identity activity.

labs.title: AWS Cross-Account Role Escalation
labs.summary: Principal LAB modeling deterministic AWS cross-account trust reachability through sts:AssumeRole, Shield finding linkage, and Aegis Runtime identity signal mapping.

labs.title: AWS Privilege Escalation via iam:PassRole
labs.summary: Principal LAB modeling deterministic AWS privilege escalation through iam:PassRole combined with compute service creation or update capability.

labs.title: AWS Role Chaining Escalation
labs.summary: Principal LAB modeling deterministic AWS privilege expansion through chained sts:AssumeRole paths across multiple IAM roles.

labs.title: Azure Entra ID Basics
labs.summary: Starter lab introducing Azure Entra ID identity flow, Conditional Access, and RBAC concepts.

labs.title: GCP IAM Basics
labs.summary: Starter lab covering Google Cloud IAM principals, policy bindings, and request-time authorization.

labs.title: AI Governance Command Center Overview
labs.summary: Learn how an enterprise AI governance command center connects intake, risk, policy, approvals, evidence, observability, and operational handoff.

labs.title: Governance Intake and Risk Tiering
labs.summary: Learn how intake questions and risk tiers create consistent AI governance triage before a workflow reaches production.

labs.title: AI Data Classification and Access Boundary
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how data classification, access boundaries, source authority, approved use, logging behavior, and evidence records shape AI governance decisions.

labs.title: AI Model Risk Tiering and Review Routing
labs.summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how to route AI use cases to security, privacy, legal, architecture, executive, or human-review paths based on model risk tier and operational impact.

labs.title: Policy Gates and Human Approval
labs.summary: Learn how policy gates convert AI governance rules into deterministic allow, deny, or approval-required decisions.

labs.title: Agent Workflow Governance
labs.summary: Learn how governed agent workflows separate recommendation, approval, and execution boundaries.

labs.title: Observability, Cost Controls, and Support Handoff
labs.summary: Learn how traces, cost controls, guardrails, SOPs, and runbooks make AI workflows operable after demo or deployment.

labs.title: Executive Demo and Portfolio Boundary
labs.summary: Learn how to present an AI governance command center to executives while preserving case-study, demo, and production boundaries.

tracks.title: AI Governance Command Center Track
tracks.summary: Guided course for enterprise AI governance command center design.

tracks.title: AI Security Engineering L2 Track
tracks.summary: Planned SecureTheCloud Labs intermediate track for engineering secure AI systems with prompt boundaries, tool permissions, retrieval controls, runtime guardrails, abuse controls, testing harnesses, and evidence packages.

tracks.title: AI Red Team Scenario Design L2 Track
